task_completion.description: Open and read the SOP document containing the required parameter values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano) or terminal window (using cat, less) displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/battery_nav_sop.txt.

task_completion.description: Open QGroundControl and navigate to the Parameters menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl is open with the 'Vehicle Setup' (gear icon) menu selected, and the 'Parameters' tab is active.

task_completion.description: Configure battery capacity and voltage parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the QGroundControl parameter editor, BATT_CAPACITY is set to 5200, BATT_LOW_VOLT is set to 21.6, and BATT_CRT_VOLT is set to 20.4.
In the QGroundControl parameter editor, BATT_FS_LOW_ACT is set to 2, and BATT_FS_CRT_ACT is set to 1.
In the QGroundControl parameter editor, BATT_LOW_MAH is set to 1040, and BATT_CRT_MAH is set to 520.
In the QGroundControl parameter editor, WPNAV_SPEED is set to 350, WPNAV_SPEED_DN is set to 100, and WPNAV_LOIT_SPEED is set to 250.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGroundControl GUI to modify parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent searching for and typing values into the QGroundControl parameter editor, rather than using terminal commands, MAVProxy, or scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened the SOP file to retrieve the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be at least one screenshot showing the SOP file open in an editor or printed in the terminal, proving the values were not hallucinated or hardcoded from external knowledge.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the QGroundControl interface or results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter changes must be visible within the genuine QGroundControl application window, not just typed into a text file or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The SOP document is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/battery_nav_sop.txt. The required parameter values are: BATT_CAPACITY: 5200, BATT_LOW_VOLT: 21.6, BATT_CRT_VOLT: 20.4, BATT_FS_LOW_ACT: 2, BATT_FS_CRT_ACT: 1, BATT_LOW_MAH: 1040, BATT_CRT_MAH: 520, WPNAV_SPEED: 350, WPNAV_SPEED_DN: 100, WPNAV_LOIT_SPEED: 250. The agent must configure these exact values in QGroundControl.
